[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 000011011 4
1 111101011 7
2 100011011 5
3 100011111 6
4 011111111 8
5 011000110 4
6 111111111 a
7 101111011 7

01 10 110111110 7
12 21 100111111 7
23 32 100111011 6
34 43 011001111 6
45 54 111101111 8
56 65 111111111 a match 6
67 76 001110111 6
70 07 110111111 8

02 20 110111011 7
13 31 100111111 7
24 42 111111101 8
35 53 111101111 8
46 64 011110110 6
57 75 111111111 a match 6
60 06 111111010 7
71 17 100111111 7

14 41 111111110 8
25 52 111111111 a match 6
36 63 001111011 6
47 74 011110101 6
50 05 111101111 8
61 16 101111110 7
72 27 100111101 6

04 40 111101110 7
15 51 111111111 a match 6
26 62 101111011 7 match 7
37 73 000111111 6
